test_cases.title: Successful Login with Valid Credentials
test_cases.description: Test the successful login process for a registered user with valid credentials.
steps: Navigate to the ParaBank homepage.
Enter a valid Username in the Customer Login panel.
Enter a valid Password in the Customer Login panel.
Click the 'Log In' button.
test_cases.expected_results: The user is redirected to the 'Accounts Overview' page, a welcome message with the user's first and last name is displayed, and the 'Log Out' link is visible in the left-hand menu.

test_cases.title: Unsuccessful Login with Invalid Username
test_cases.description: Test the login process with an invalid username and valid password.
steps: Navigate to the ParaBank homepage.
Enter an invalid Username in the Customer Login panel.
Enter a valid Password in the Customer Login panel.
Click the 'Log In' button.
test_cases.expected_results: The system denies access, displays the error message 'The username and password could not be verified.', and redirects the user to the '/parabank/login.htm' error page.

test_cases.title: Unsuccessful Login with Invalid Password
test_cases.description: Test the login process with a valid username and invalid password.
steps: Navigate to the ParaBank homepage.
Enter a valid Username in the Customer Login panel.
Enter an invalid Password in the Customer Login panel.
Click the 'Log In' button.
test_cases.expected_results: The system denies access, displays the error message 'The username and password could not be verified.', and redirects the user to the '/parabank/login.htm' error page.

test_cases.title: Unsuccessful Login with Empty Username
test_cases.description: Test the login process with an empty username field.
steps: Navigate to the ParaBank homepage.
Leave the Username field empty in the Customer Login panel.
Enter a valid Password in the Customer Login panel.
Click the 'Log In' button.
test_cases.expected_results: The system denies access, displays the error message 'Please enter a username and password.', and redirects the user to the '/parabank/login.htm' error page.

test_cases.title: Unsuccessful Login with Empty Password
test_cases.description: Test the login process with an empty password field.
steps: Navigate to the ParaBank homepage.
Enter a valid Username in the Customer Login panel.
Leave the Password field empty in the Customer Login panel.
Click the 'Log In' button.
test_cases.expected_results: The system denies access, displays the error message 'Please enter a username and password.', and redirects the user to the '/parabank/login.htm' error page.

test_cases.title: Unsuccessful Login with Both Fields Empty
test_cases.description: Test the login process with both username and password fields empty.
steps: Navigate to the ParaBank homepage.
Leave both Username and Password fields empty in the Customer Login panel.
Click the 'Log In' button.
test_cases.expected_results: The system denies access, displays the error message 'Please enter a username and password.', and redirects the user to the '/parabank/login.htm' error page.

test_cases.title: Session Termination via Log Out
test_cases.description: Test the session termination process when a logged-in user clicks the 'Log Out' link.
steps: Log in to the ParaBank application with valid credentials.
Click the 'Log Out' link in the left-hand menu.
test_cases.expected_results: The system securely terminates the session and redirects the user back to the public homepage ('/parabank/index.htm').
